Event: The Gone Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/04/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR214


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Fire Lord Outfit

Once in a while when the unit has less than 50% health remaining and they gain a debuff, a random debuff is removed from the unit, and the unit's spell power, magic armor, and damage are increased by 30% for 6 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.
Additionally, the armor wearer can't be disarmed for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
